goals.title: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approv...
goals.objective: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approved requirements: AXI4 256-bit one-TLP-per-transaction ingress, interleaved per-Q MCTP assembly, 256-bit SRAM payload packing without holes, AXI read/FW visibility, per-Q FSM/register/status/error/drop accounting, coverage/mutation/signoff all green. Required criteria: happy-path single and multi-fragment assembly; interleaved queue assembly; payload packing alignment including 64B, unaligned-to-32B and 4KB boundary cases; AXI read path/FW descriptor visibility; packet-drop and assemble-drop conditions; regression that prior signoff blockers rtl_todo, scoreboard, coverage, mutation are closed; adversarial malformed/stale/misleading success checks. Evidence must include RED-to-GREEN tests, tmux manual QA transcripts, final ip_signoff status pass, wiki update, and reviewer approval.

goals.title: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approv...
goals.objective: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approved requirements: AXI4 256-bit one-TLP-per-transaction ingress, interleaved per-Q MCTP assembly, 256-bit SRAM payload packing without holes, AXI read/FW visibility, per-Q FSM/register/status/error/drop accounting, coverage/mutation/signoff all green. Required criteria: happy-path single and multi-fragment assembly; interleaved queue assembly; payload packing alignment including 64B, unaligned-to-32B and 4KB boundary cases; AXI read path/FW descriptor visibility; packet-drop and assemble-drop conditions; regression that prior signoff blockers rtl_todo, scoreboard, coverage, mutation are closed; adversarial malformed/stale/misleading success checks. Evidence must include RED-to-GREEN tests, tmux manual QA transcripts, final ip_signoff status pass, wiki update, and reviewer approval.
